hero.subtitle: FOR PUBLIC FACILITY MANAGEMENT
hero.description: Redefining public facility management through seamless integration, technical precision, and uncompromising standards of excellence across Kuwait.

executiveSummary.title: Executive Summary
paragraphs: Elite International Company For Public Facility Management is a comprehensive facility management solutions provider delivering end-to-end, integrated, and scalable services designed to support the efficient operation, maintenance, and long-term enhancement of commercial, industrial, institutional, and residential assets.

With deep industry expertise and a client-focused approach, Elite International offers both hard and soft facility management services, seamlessly integrated through standardized processes, advanced technologies, and a highly skilled workforce.

We are committed to operational excellence and continuous improvement, leveraging modern facility management systems, real-time performance monitoring, and clearly defined service-level agreements (SLAs) to ensure transparency and accountability.

Driven by a culture of safety, professionalism, and innovation, Elite International maintains rigorous Quality, Health, Safety, and Environmental (QHSE) standards. Our experienced management team and dedicated staff work collaboratively to deliver future-ready facility management solutions.

about.title: Who We Are
about.description: Elite International Company is a leader in public facility management across Kuwait, dedicated to operational excellence, technical precision, and sustainable solutions.
about.mission: To deliver comprehensive, reliable, and compliant facility management services that ensure the safety, functionality, and sustainability of public-sector facilities. We are committed to protecting public assets through proactive maintenance, efficient resource management, and strict adherence to regulatory standards.

vision.title: Strategic Leadership
vision.desc: To become a benchmark organization known for operational excellence.

vision.title: Sustainability Focused
vision.desc: Integrating sustainability and preventive asset management.

vision.title: Community Value
vision.desc: Ensuring safe and accessible public spaces for all.

qhse.title: QHSE Commitment
qhse.description: Elite International maintains strict Quality, Health, Safety, and Environmental standards aligned with international best practices. We prioritize the health and safety of people, assets, and environments through proactive risk management.
commitments: Compliance with safety regulations and procedures
Safety and quality embedded in every aspect

reviews.name: Ahmed Al-Farsi
reviews.text: Elite International has been managing our corporate offices for two years. Their attention to detail in soft services is unmatched in Kuwait.

reviews.name: Sarah Al-Rashidi
reviews.text: The security team is professional and always alert. We feel much safer with their 24/7 surveillance solutions.

reviews.name: Michael Thompson
reviews.text: Reliable Hard Services! They fixed our HVAC issues overnight, ensuring no downtime for our medical facility.

reviews.name: Fatima Al-Sabah
reviews.text: Their cleaning staff is meticulous. Our public spaces have never looked better. Highly recommend their integrated approach.

reviews.name: Abdullah Ali
reviews.text: Great response time and professional management. They really understand the local market needs.

details: Routine upkeep of offices & public areas
